---
title: "An Introduction to Bayesian Methods in Neuropsychology for Psychometrists"
subtitle: "National Association of Psychometrists 2026 Annual Meeting"
author: "Quinton Quagliano, M.S., B.C.S.P."
date: "2026-06-11"
# SECTION: Bibliography opts
bibliography: "./refs/refs.bib"
cite-method: citeproc
citeproc: true
csl: "../resources/bibs/apa.csl"
link-citations: true
link-bibliography: true
---

# Introduction

## Follow Along

::: {.r-stack}

QR Code Goes Here

:::

::: {.r-stack}

<https://qquagliano.github.io/nap_2026_presentation/presentation/presentation_slides.html>

:::

::: {.r-stack}

Shortened Link Goes Here

:::

## Disclosures & Disclaimers

- I have no financial disclosures or conflicts-of-interests related to this
  presentation

- This presentation has not been drafted, ideated on, or edited with use of AI
  or LLMs. Any mistakes made are human error.

## Learning Objectives

## References {#sec-refs}

::: {#refs}
:::
